description_long: This is a small, modern light airplane with a streamlined blue fuselage and a pair of straight, mid-mounted wings finished in a metallic silver color. The cockpit is enclosed with a large, tinted canopy, providing ample visibility for the pilot and possibly a passenger. The aircraft features a twin-boom tail design, with two vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer, and a single pusher propeller mounted at the rear between the booms. The landing gear is tricycle-style, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel under the forward fuselage. The overall design suggests a sporty, possibly amphibious or light utility aircraft suitable for short urban or regional flights. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with metallic and composite materials likely used throughout the structure.
description: A sleek, blue and silver light airplane with a mid-mounted wing, twin-boom tail, rear pusher propeller, and tricycle landing gear. The cockpit is enclosed with a large canopy and the surface is smooth and glossy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide canopy, and straight wings extending horizontally with visible landing gear beneath.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlights the blue fuselage, silver wings, cockpit canopy, and the rear-mounted pusher propeller between the twin tail booms.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the central pusher propeller, with the landing gear visible below.
description_view_3: Front-right angle reveals the cockpit canopy, nose wheel, and the configuration of the wings and tail booms, as well as the rear propeller.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; wings are mounted at the center of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin-boom tail with two vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large canopy, likely single or dual seat.
